title: Implementer Context Payload
description: Cheap implementer context for a bounded changed-path scope.

kind.description: Discriminator for the implementer context payload shape.

target.description: Resolved target repository for the implementation context.

planning_revision.description: Optimistic Planning state revision observed by this implementer read surface.

active_plan_reliance.description: Permission signal separating command-written integrity, planning freshness, and active-plan reliance.

adaptive_routing.description: Machine-readable need classification, read budget, and escalation detail commands for this implementer packet.

items.description: One entry in the changed paths list.

changed_paths.description: Changed paths used to select proof, ownership, and inspect scope.

items.description: One entry in the inspect files list.

inspect_files.description: Files the implementer should inspect before editing.

items.description: One entry in the files to avoid list.

files_to_avoid.description: Files that should stay untouched for this bounded task.

package_boundary.description: Package/root boundary warnings that affect implementation scope.

items.description: One entry in the path boundaries list.

path_boundaries.description: Path-specific ownership and locality constraints for the changed paths.

items.description: One entry in the authority markers list.

authority_markers.description: Authority markers relevant to the implementation scope.

task_intent.description: Task-intent carry-forward packet used to derive acceptance, proof guidance, objective-drift checks, and closeout prompts.

acceptance.description: Definition-of-done expectations inferred from task intent.

proof.description: Selected proof lane and validation commands for the changed paths.

items.description: One entry in the required validation commands list.

required_validation_commands.description: Commands that must pass before claiming implementation complete.

acceptance_reconciliation.description: Compact checklist requiring requested outcomes to be reconciled against delivered behavior and proof before closeout.

intent_acknowledgement.description: Guidance for stating inferred intent, first slice, non-goals, and correction point before non-direct implementation.

reuse_pressure.description: Changed-path reuse and abstraction-pressure facts that help the agent decide whether to reuse, accept duplication, or route extraction follow-up.

objective_drift.description: Heuristic warning when changed files do not mention explicit requested outcomes.

status.description: Whether the implementer context is based on changed paths or an unknown scope.

minimum_before_editing.description: Minimum orientation step an agent should complete before implementation.

preflight_command.description: Command for one-call startup, config, and active-state orientation.

summary_command.description: Command for active planning and handoff-state orientation.

trust_note.description: Review-trust consequence when workspace orientation is skipped for planned or high-risk work.

orientation.description: Minimum workspace orientation guidance for the implementer.

rule.description: Boundary for what implement --changed can derive from available workspace state.

items.description: One class of guidance the command can infer.

can_infer.description: Information classes derived from paths, config, active planning, or package metadata.

items.description: One class of guidance the command cannot infer.

cannot_infer.description: Information classes that still require human or agent judgment.

when_uncertain.description: Routing instruction when changed-path context is insufficient.

kind.description: Discriminator for the execution posture payload.

capability_posture.description: Task capability posture inferred from changed paths and optional task text.

runtime_resolution.description: Compact stay-local, stronger-reasoning, external-delegation, or manual-handoff recommendation.

delegation_control.description: Local human-control mode and whether automatic delegation is permitted.

selected_target.description: Suggested local delegation target when one matches the inferred posture.

capability_handoff_packets.description: Capability-aware handoff packet templates for escalation, down-routing, human clarification, review fallback, and no-safe-route cases.

recommended_action.description: Recommended execution category for the implementer.

quality_tradeoff.description: Why the recommendation preserves or improves implementation quality.

token_tradeoff.description: When token saving is acceptable or should be deferred.

ready_handoff.description: Prompt or handoff packet to use when local mode allows manual or suggested delegation.

delegation_decision.description: Compact local delegation, escalation, clarification, or stay-local decision derived from local posture and changed-path signals.

decomposition_delegation.description: Delegation candidates discovered from active planning decompositions, when active decomposed work is visible.

items.description: One limit of the inferred execution posture.

inference_limits.description: Limits that prevent the posture recommendation from becoming hidden execution authority.

execution_posture.description: Actionable local execution posture for orchestration before implementation.

durable_intent.description: Compact durable system or subsystem intent pressure that may affect scope, proof, delegation, or closeout.

durable_intent_promotion.description: Guidance for promoting non-finishable task intent into durable memory, docs, subsystem intent, or system intent.

delegation_decision.description: Top-level copy of the compact delegation decision for next-action consumers.

workflow_sufficiency.description: Small decision record that says whether the current implementer packet is enough for the next implementation step or which exact detail field should be requested.

planning_safety_gate.description: Planning ownership guard for broad, high-assurance, decomposed, or scope-widened implementation work.

continuation_state.description: Compact continuation-state contract for preserving only unfinished or handoff-relevant work, not historical residue.

authority_hierarchy.description: Authority and promotion-path guidance for deciding which repo surfaces are current instruction, durable memory, future work, or historical audit.

compliance_economics.description: Boundary statement for what Agentic Workspace can enforce directly and where it instead makes noncompliance visible or costly.

kind.description: Discriminator for the acceptance reconciliation guidance.

status.description: Whether acceptance reconciliation is required before closeout for the current context.

rule.description: Why validation alone is not enough for closeout.

items.description: One explicit symbol or outcome extracted from the task text.

requested_outcomes.description: Concrete task outcomes available for acceptance mapping.

items.description: One inferred acceptance item to reconcile before closeout.

acceptance_items.description: Definition-of-done items inferred from task intent.

acceptance_item_count.description: Number of acceptance items to reconcile before closeout.

acceptance_closeout_rule.description: Acceptance-specific closeout rule for claiming done.

items.description: One required acceptance reconciliation check.

checklist.description: Checklist for mapping requested outcomes to delivered behavior and proof.

compact_closeout_prompt.description: Short prompt agents can use before final answer or lane closeout.

task_text_available.description: Whether the CLI invocation included task text to reconcile.

task_carry_forward_hint.description: Short reminder to preserve task text across start and implement calls.

acceptance_reconciliation.description: Closeout guard against passing self-authored tests while missing requested behavior.

kind.description: Discriminator for the lightweight objective-drift heuristic.

status.description: Whether requested task terms appear missing from changed surfaces.

reason.description: Why no drift comparison could be made, when applicable.

items.description: One requested symbol or concrete outcome extracted from the task text.

requested_outcomes.description: Task-specific terms checked against changed files.

acceptance_item_count.description: Number of inferred acceptance items that should be reconciled before closeout.

acceptance_closeout_rule.description: Acceptance-specific closeout rule carried into objective-drift guidance.

items.description: Requested outcome not found in the changed file contents.

missing_from_changed_surface.description: Requested terms that were not observed in changed files.

rule.description: Closeout rule agents should apply when drift is suspected.

recommended_next_action.description: Small next step for resolving or dismissing the drift signal.

heuristic.description: Brief explanation of the comparison method.

objective_drift.description: Heuristic warning when changed files do not mention explicit requested outcomes.

items.description: One entry in the before handoff list.

before_handoff.description: Ordered before handoff entries used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the stop when list.

stop_when.description: Ordered stop when entries used by this contract.

handoff_requirements.description: Information that must be preserved before pausing or handing off work.

next_allowed_action.description: Smallest safe implementation action after reading this context.

items.description: Changed path used for proof selection.

changed_paths.description: Paths used to select validation lanes.

items.description: Condition that activates this proof lane.

when.description: Path or task conditions that activate this lane.

items.description: Required validation command for this lane.

recovery_signal.description: What to inspect or route when this proof lane is insufficient.

items.description: Selected proof lane.

selected_lanes.description: Proof lanes selected by changed paths.

items.description: Required command selected from proof lanes.
Optional command that can strengthen proof.

validation_plan.description: Executable validation plan derived from selected lanes.

items.description: Condition that requires broader proof.

broaden_when.description: Signals that narrow proof is no longer enough.

items.description: Condition that requires escalation or stronger review.

escalate_when.description: Signals that the implementer should not guess.

acceptance_guidance.description: Guidance that proof should demonstrate acceptance satisfaction, not only command success.

proof_selection.description: Changed-path proof selection and validation plan.

kind.description: Discriminator for the task-intent acceptance payload.

status.description: Whether acceptance was inferred from task text or is unavailable.

source.description: Source used to infer the acceptance checklist.

confidence.description: Confidence in the inferred definition of done.

requested_outcomes.description: Low-level requested outcome signals extracted from task text.

expectation.description: Definition-of-done expectation to satisfy or explicitly route.

proof_hint.description: Compact hint for selecting proof that demonstrates this expectation.

status.description: Current reconciliation state for this acceptance item.

source.description: Source signal that produced this acceptance item.

items.description: One inferred acceptance expectation.
Compact definition-of-done checklist inferred from task intent.

closeout_required.description: Whether closeout must reconcile acceptance before claiming done.

closeout_rule.description: Rule for reconciling acceptance before final answer or lane closeout.

proof_rule.description: Rule for selecting proof that demonstrates acceptance satisfaction.

unresolved_questions.description: Questions that block honest acceptance reconciliation.

kind.description: Discriminator for durable task-intent promotion guidance.

status.description: Whether the task intent contains durable promotion signals.

reason.description: Reason promotion guidance is not applicable, when absent.

matched_markers.description: Heuristic durable-intent markers found in task text.

rule.description: Promotion rule to apply before closeout.

route_options.description: Candidate durable surfaces for non-finishable task intent.

acceptance_item_count.description: Number of acceptance items considered for durable promotion.

closeout_question.description: Question agents should answer before discarding task intent after closeout.

task_intent_promotion_guidance.description: Guidance for promoting durable task intent to memory, docs, subsystem intent, or system intent.

status.description: Whether validation is ready to inspect or run.

items.description: Required validation step.
Optional validation step.

next_proof.description: How to proceed after the current validation step.

validation_plan.description: Validation steps selected from proof lanes.

status.description: Whether capability posture was inferred, configured, or unavailable.

posture.description: Human-readable posture details used for review.

work_shape.description: Inferred work shape such as direct, bounded, lane, or epic.

proof_burden.description: Expected proof burden for this task.

items.description: Risk flag that affects capability routing.

risk_flags.description: Risk signals inferred from paths or task text.

items.description: Evidence an implementer should inspect before execution.

inspection_evidence_required.description: Context required before trusting the posture.

classification_authority.description: Authority used to classify task capability needs.

self_assessment_authority.description: Authority level of a model's own confidence or self-assessment.

capability_posture.description: Task capability classification for changed-path implementation.

items.description: Reason for the route recommendation.
Alternative execution route.

score.description: Relative fit score for this target.

items.description: Reason for this target recommendation.

reasons.description: Why the target fits or does not fit.

required_action.description: Action required before or during execution with this target.

items.description: Configured target fit recommendation.

profile_recommendations.description: Fit analysis for configured delegation targets.

guidance.description: Compact route guidance for the current executor.

posture_source.description: Source of the posture used for route selection.

items.description: Available route category.

resolution_categories.description: Route categories this resolver can emit.

rule.description: Rule describing how self-assessment may be used.

items.description: Decision self-assessment may influence.
Higher-authority signal self-assessment cannot override.

runtime_resolution.description: Capability-aware route resolution for the current task.

configured_mode.description: Delegation mode from local configuration or defaults.

effective_mode.description: Delegation mode after runtime constraints are applied.

items.description: Supported delegation mode.

source.description: Where the effective delegation mode came from.

execution_permitted.description: Whether the package may execute delegation automatically.

safe_to_auto_run_commands.description: Whether auto mode may run command-based delegation.

disabled_reason.description: Reason delegation execution is disabled, when known.

next_action.description: Allowed next action under the current mode.

delegation_control.description: Local delegation control and human-autonomy boundary.

rule.description: Rule for when to use capability handoff packets.

items.description: Field every handoff packet should include.

common_required_fields.description: Common fields for prepared delegation packets.

capability_handoff_packets.description: Reusable packet templates for capability-aware handoff.

kind.description: Discriminator for prepared capability handoff packets.

mode.description: Delegation mode that produced the packet.

target.description: Recommended receiver target when one is selected.

task_shape.description: Task shape being delegated or escalated.

route_reason.description: Why this route fits the task.

items.description: Context already inspected before handoff.

inspected_context.description: Context the receiver may rely on.

proof_expectations.description: Proof burden or commands expected from the receiver.

items.description: Condition that requires stopping instead of guessing.

capability_handoff_packet.description: Prepared packet for escalation, down-routing, or human clarification.

path.description: Path segments or repository path used by this contract.

authority.description: Authority level or owner for this surface.

canonical_source.description: Source of truth for this generated, derived, or adapter surface.

safe_to_edit.description: Whether agents may edit this surface under the declared authority rules.

refresh_command.description: Command used to refresh this generated or managed surface.

authority_marker.description: Authority marker details used by this contract.

status.description: Current lifecycle, readiness, or health state.

cwd.description: Working directory context used when running the command.

warning.description: Warning contract value used by this contract.

package_root.description: Package root text value used by this contract.

package_boundary.description: Package boundary details used by this contract.

path.description: Path segments or repository path used by this contract.

authority.description: Authority level or owner for this surface.

warning.description: Warning contract value used by this contract.

requires_attention.description: Requires attention true/false policy flag used by this contract.

path_boundary.description: Path boundary details used by this contract.
